release.notes: D1 Fixed Nickname getter, Moved Logger to CoreUtils D2 Fixed Config and ViewHeads commands. D3 Fixed Wolf, Cat, Bee, Also Wither will respect the chances for all 3 heads. D4 Removed MoreMobHeadsLib and the nbtapi library, added update.json to fix files from D3. D5 Fixed head translator sometimes double spacing. Fixed All_Black and Tuxedo cat heads. D6 Added Baby Mobs(100+ new heads), Major overhaul of the JsonUpdateHandler to properly support deep nesting and automatic migration. D7 Fixed some baby heads with issues. Updated language files. D8 Fixed Creaking head. Fixed some settings not being reloaded with command.

developer.notes: D1 Fixed player chance loading, started caching player(online) skin URLs. D2 Added Sulfur Cube, Sulfur and variants, Cinnabar and variants. D3 Now caches online player skin URL on join.
